prompts.name: yunnan_bamboo_highla_blue_hour
prompts.text: RAW photo, professional nature photography, Yunnan bamboo highlands of China at the mystical blue hour. The dense bamboo forest shrouded in heavy fog, creating an ethereal atmosphere as if stepping into a dream. Composition focuses on leading lines formed by towering bamboo stalks, their texture accentuated by the soft, diffused light filtering through the misty air. Canon EOS R5, 24mm f/1.8, f/4, ISO 6400, ultra realistic, National Geographic.
